troubleshooting.title: Downloads failing or stuck?
troubleshooting.body: The most common fix is updating the download tools. yt-dlp and ffmpeg receive frequent updates to keep up with platform changes. Click "Update Now" below.

troubleshooting.title: TikTok audio not downloading?
troubleshooting.body: TikTok regularly changes its API. Updating yt-dlp to the latest version usually resolves this instantly.

troubleshooting.title: Video preview shows an error?
troubleshooting.body: Preview issues rarely affect the actual download. Try clicking Download anyway — it will often succeed even when the preview fails.

troubleshooting.title: "Merging" step takes a long time?
troubleshooting.body: High-quality downloads (1080p+) require ffmpeg to merge separate video and audio streams. This is normal and can take a minute or two for longer videos.

troubleshooting.title: Format conversion fails (ProRes, DNxHD)?
troubleshooting.body: Professional codec conversion requires the full ffmpeg GPL build with all codecs. Use "Update Tools" to make sure you have the correct build.

troubleshooting.title: Instagram / Twitter video not working?
troubleshooting.body: Private or age-restricted content cannot be downloaded. For Twitter/X, make sure you are using the full post URL including the status ID.

contact.label: GitHub — Report a bug or request a feature
